about_item: Airline Compliant, Frameless, Soft Sided 18.5" Exterior Length x 11.75" Width x 11.5" Flex Height, best fit for pets less than approximately 17" in length while laying down. Keep in mind the interior of any bag is less then than the exterior due to fabric and padding thickness.

Meets Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) requirements; Fits Under Seat on Most Major Airlines Premium Brand Auto Self Locking Zippers for Safety and Eliminating the need for fragile clasps as the tote cannot be pushed open by your pet from the inside

Faux Fleece Comfort Padding with Composite Base Insert for Additional Support and Weight Handling (treated with an eco-friendly, zinc-based technology that provides antimicrobial protection and guards against odor-causing bacteria).
Recommended for Pets Up to 30lbs Weighs only 4lbs

Open Air Large Mesh Window Ventilation on Top and All Four Sides Fabric Roll Away Privacy Top Cover and Sides with Top Loading Opening Luggage Strap for Attaching to Baggage and Wheelbases Zippered Mesh Pocket for Storing Treats, Meds, Papers Padded Shoulder Strap with Thick Metal Connectors for Additional Safety Can Also Be Used as a Leash

summary.text: Customers find this pet carrier to be well-constructed with strong straps and double-secured zippers, and appreciate its spacious design that accommodates two 3-month-old kittens. The carrier is comfortable to carry through airports and fits perfectly in front or underneath seats, with one customer noting it aligns with airline dimension requirements. They like the carrier's design, with one mentioning its tan leather look straps, and find it durable and well-made.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find this pet carrier to be of great quality, with one customer specifically noting it as the best carrier they have used.

examples.snippet: ...there are many openings and the expandable mesh, the bag is good quality, the bedding is comfortable, and it looks good overall....
Great product! My 10 lbs disabled dog had plenty of room. The only qualm was that it was a little too tall for under the seat.
Wonderful size great quality. Really love that the zippers clip together and my kittens love sitting in here when it’s on the floor!
Great carrier!! I have a senior pug and never thought to bring him with me on the plane until this Christmas....

insights.title: Durability
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier sturdy and long-lasting, with strong straps that hold its shape well.

examples.snippet: ...It really is sturdy. We didn’t really use the strap because the handle was enough, well balanced even with the cat stirring, comfortable just as is....
...It's durable, expandable, and easy to clean. My 12 lb Pomeranian fits in it perfectly with enough room to be comfortable in....
This crate is amazing! It’s stylish, very durable, and extremely soft on the inside. My dog is very happy traveling in it....
the top of the carrier was warped, giving my cat much less head space....

insights.title: Design
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the design of the pet carrier, finding it attractive and well-structured, with one customer specifically noting the tan leather look straps.

examples.snippet: This is great. Very high quality and stylish. Has a lot of mesh panels for ventilation and everything is thought out except one major flaw!...
It looks nice and sturdy. i like the safe zipper closures very much and the fact that it can open from the top....
...I like the color and the fabric and the design. I love the zippers with the extra security lock. The bag I s very good made....
It fits my full-grown female cat just fine, and is very stylish. I love that it expands and can connect to seatbelts and luggage....

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the carrier's size, finding it spacious enough for two 3-month-old kittens and smallish dogs, while being compact enough for plane travel.

examples.snippet: I absolutely love this bag! It’s the perfect size, not too bulky and works well for my cat 11 lb cat....
...I have larger cats and each had plenty of room and enjoyed having the expandable side area to stretch out even further. I would highly recommend.
...They’re comfortable and roomy. Both cats were able to turn around, sit up and lay down easily....
...Unfortunately this is too small for my two rather large bunnies. This would be a great choice for a single cat, tiny dog, or small bunny.

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier comfortable, particularly noting that it is easy to carry through the airport and that their pets had a pleasant trip. One customer mentions that the fold-down side made the journey more comfortable for their large pet.

examples.snippet: ...Fantastic quality, great price, my 16lb dog was happy and comfortable, especially while waiting at the gate and on the plane itself as that's when I...
...but he is long and lean, and was still very comfortable. I'm sure even a larger cat would still be comfortable. I have larger cats (16 and 20 lbs.)...
...Seems small at first but he was comfy and relaxed. We flipped the top open and he poked his head out occasionally and never caused any fuss....
...who have pets, they have taken into consideration the pets safety and comfort. And the shoulder strap makes it easy to carry the cat....

insights.title: Fit
insights.summary: Customers find that the pet carrier fits well in various positions, including front/underneath seats, under the seat, and on top of luggage handles.

examples.snippet: Fits perfectly under the seat inside the aircraft. Highly recommended for anyone traveling with their fur baby.
...It fit perfectly under the seat in front of me and was a breeze for security. Cat was calm and arrived safely with me 6 hours later!
...It worked beautifully! The soft design allows it to fit under the seat....
One tick because it did not fit under the seat on our first cabin flight on Delta.

insights.title: Zipper quality
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the carrier's double-secured zippers and multiple access doors, with one customer noting that they open and close smoothly.

examples.snippet: Love quality workmanship, locking zippers, padded shoulder strap and handles and expandable section which allows more inside room....
Lots of zippers. Unfortunately Nessa can unzip them from the inside. Which is probably why they come with little tiny locks......
love it! especially the sturdy zippers. I have a feisty cat and love knowing she can't open the zippers.
...The second time I used it the side zipper broke and my dog got out.

insights.title: Construction
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the construction of the pet carrier, with one customer noting the strong stitching and well-finished zippers.

examples.snippet: LOVE LOVE This wonderful pet carrier!!! It is so well made!!!! Lovely color, fabric just like a high end carrier!!!! Love their products!!!!!!...
Very well made, evident in the details, and looks great.
...This doesn’t look like a typical “doggie bag” which I love. It is well constructed, sturdy and I really like the “extras”...
...However, the carrier was well built and looked really nicely made. The color was great and it was a vere stylish carrier. Wish my dog fit!

authors_reviews.title: Good Product
authors_reviews.text: I've only traveled with it once, but it held up well and provided comfort and security for my pet. The faux fur cover of the pad is easily cleanable. Good size. Durable zippers, the shoulder strap is convenient but weird to hold pet under arm, kind of unwieldy. However, luggage handle feature is great as long as you are NOT putting it on a carry on handle. It's too big and will force the bag to topple over and/or you will have to hold it firmly in place while wheeling your carry on. Also, the pet will slide to the front and kind of tip over the side of your carry on a bit. The fold out "tent" is nice but my pet wasn't interested, so would not opt for a fold out tent in a carrier, especially if you are not utilizing it for long periods of time. It's a nice color (gray) and material. Good replacement choice for my old carrier.
authors_reviews.author: Mg17

authors_reviews.title: Best Carrier
authors_reviews.text: First time flying with my fur baby and although I initially purchased a different carrier I couldn't stop thinking about and looking at this carrier so I listened to my instincts and purchased this carrier. I am so happy I got it and wasnt disappointed. Carrier Delivered on time (ordered and received 4 days before flight) This carrier is well made; came with its own storage bag when not in use and carrier folds within itself for the bag storage. I have a miniature yorkie weighs 6 pounds and this carrier was perfect for him. It had enough room for him to lay down; turn around and stand up even with top zippered. No messes made so no need to clean but could clean inside and out with ease. The pad mat inside that my yorkie laid on was plush; soft; comfortable; zips on/off to easily wash and dry in machine. The extendable section on the side was great and the pocket came in handy. This carrier fit under JetBlue seat with no problems. I highly recommend this carrier!!!
authors_reviews.author: Ali9898

authors_reviews.title: Luxury Pet Carrier
authors_reviews.text: I've had other pet carriers which also worked fine but having recently done alot of travelling with my cat, I wanted to have a really nice one and this is really nice. The inside pad is incredibly soft and the look and feel of the gray fabric and leather straps make it more than just utilitarian. Good zippered openings in various places and it has an expansion compartment so that you can add a little extra running space inside. I've used this on AA, Delta and jetBlue with no issues. Occasionally you have to bend the sides down a little for take off and landing. You can use one of the two side straps to sling the carrier over a suitcase which is by far the best feature.
authors_reviews.author: Daily Runner

authors_reviews.title: Well assembled for travel
authors_reviews.text: Just used Mr Peanuts carrier for a three day car trip. Found it to be so well thought out for travel. Love that the top of the carrier has a zippable flap that you can roll back and snap the fastener to stay in place. Also love the zip pocket where I kept my pup’s leash - so convenient! Could just open the carrier from that side and attach her leash before pulling her out. Also like that the bottom cushion allowed me to tuck her blanket underneath it. She’s only 10 lbs so the small gave her room to turnaround and play with her toy. The carrier straps are strong and the additional shoulder strap made checking into hotels convenient. On top of that, the bag looked attractive enough that people didn’t realize I had my puppy vs just a piece of luggage. Highly recommend.
authors_reviews.author: Karen

authors_reviews.title: Great value and lots of features
authors_reviews.text: I love this bag!! Here’s why:1. I love the design and the colors. It looks more like a cool duffel bag than a cat carrier.2. I did a lot of research and this was the only bag I found that has the expandable side AND the loop to attach it to a suitcase handle. It works great on a 4-roller suitcase that doesn’t need to be tilted and the bottom is stiff enough to support the pet.3. The expandable side makes a huge difference for my cat. She’s not huge (9 lbs) but she complains much less when the side is open and she can splay out. I got economy plus seating on my flight and was able to fly with it open even with someone sitting next to me.4. I used this carrier on a long international flight and it was comfortable for me to carry through the airport. I just use the handles over my shoulder because the shoulder strap is too long for me.5. The fleece pad is very fluffy and easy to clean. My cat seems to find it comfortable because she’ll voluntarily go sit in it, something she never did with the hard plastic case I used to have.6. The seat belt clips are also a nice feature, both to prevent my cat from tipping the carrier over off the back seat of the car and to protect her if the car stops suddenly. Even with the front flap open, she spent 80% of our car trip sitting in the carrier and it was nice to know she was safe.I do have a few complaints that make this 4 stars instead of 5:1. Some of the clips on the zippers don’t hold and this is frustrating because my cat HAS figured out how to escape by nudging the zippers open.2. Some of the stitching has come undone.3. My car has managed to pierce a hole in one of the mesh panels, although the mesh is strong enough that I’m not concerned about the hole ripping open.But honestly, this bag is an excellent value for the price. I knew that by paying this price and getting all these features it probably wouldn’t have the best quality stitching and materials. But that said, it’s a very good bag that I foresee using for a long time (I may just have to glue some stitching down from time to time).
authors_reviews.author: Lorraine

authors_reviews.title: Quality carrier
authors_reviews.text: I had no problem fitting this under the seat for a Southwest flight. It has a lot of versatile and useful features such as the pop-out extension, zippers to let their head out, and pouches to hold the shoulder strap or your pet's water dish. The built-in leash to secure to their harness allowed my pets to move around safely, but I didn't have to worry about them jumping out. It's easy to fold-up and collapse the carrier for storage. Fit 10 lb shihtzu no problem.
authors_reviews.author: E

other_countries_reviews.title: Best case for travelling on plane with small dog
other_countries_reviews.text: We used this to travel with our 14-lb shih-tzu with Air Canada on 4 flights. It was easy every time and lots of mesh for him to see out of and breathe better. When we were in airports that wouldn't let him be out of his bag, we simply extended the panel that folds out so that he had more room to sprawl and be comfortable. So far it seems to be good quality and has held up very well. Only note is that the edges of the bag are sturdy, so on some planes it won't fit fully under the seat.
other_countries_reviews.author: Ashley Devries

other_countries_reviews.title: Great choice for international travel
other_countries_reviews.text: Fantastic crate! I flew my 9lb ragdoll cat 16 hours from Australia to America, then another 10 hours travelling to Canada, and she still loves to sleep inside it every day.She is a large (long and tall) cat, and probably would be more comfortable in the XL Big Apple version. I'm probably going to buy it or a similar model for domestic travel.This bag is high quality, comfortable, durable, strong enough for her to stand on top yet flexible to stuff under an airplane seat. Lots of compliments on the look as well :) very good value!
other_countries_reviews.author: veritè

other_countries_reviews.title: Very happy with this purchase
other_countries_reviews.text: Great design and high quality materials. My dog has no problem in it. The plush is nice but can be too hot, would be nice if the side plush was more of an insert and that the leash inside was adjustable.
other_countries_reviews.author: Sylvia J.

other_countries_reviews.title: Cómoda, segura y de buena calidad.
other_countries_reviews.text: La tela se ve super resistente,igual que la malla expansible que trae en uno de los lados y en la parte superior.Honestamente pensé que mi gatito no cabría, Para que se den una idea, mi gatito pesa aproximadamente 6 kilos pero está muy largo, mide 45 CM (Acostado en 4 patitas), estando acostadito le queda poquito algo de espacio entre su cabeza y la tapita de malla de la bolsa, es muy fresca por dentro y además trae un forro tipo polar en la base,no hay peligro de que se mueva la base polar ya que trae un Velcro entre su camita y la bolsa,es fácil de cargar y mi gatito se siente seguro en ella,no llora para nada.Trae una agarradera para su correa por dentro y el gancho es fuerte por lo que no hay peligro que se safe de allí.
other_countries_reviews.author: Lizbeth Ayala

other_countries_reviews.title: Brilliant! My kitten loves it & has been taken on long car trips in it.
other_countries_reviews.text: My cat loves playing in it & even travelled in it for 4 hours on a recent trip to Devon. Sturdy / spacious / well made & comfy. Would thoroughly recommend.
other_countries_reviews.author: Amzlalon
